name: ExtensionChargeItemDefinition_Applicability_RelatedArtifact
title: R5: Reference to / quotation of the external source of the group of properties (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ChargeItemDefinition.applicability.relatedArtifact` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ChargeItemDefinition.applicability.relatedArtifact` 0..1 `RelatedArtifact`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ChargeItemDefinition.applicability.relatedArtifact` 0..1 `RelatedArtifact`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ChargeItemDefinition.applicability.relatedArtifact` has a context of ChargeItemDefinition.applicability based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ChargeItemDefinition`.
Element `ChargeItemDefinition.applicability.relatedArtifact` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
